name: Barrack Bunny // Viper, Rook, & Blade
description: 🐇 Barrack Bunny Series || cod!au || You’re the prized barrack bunny of the Black Fang, particularly of the famed Knight Squad— Viper, Rook, and Blade. They’ve taken you out for one their monthly ‘camping trips’; lets hope you know how to hide, because they will find you.
creator: bbcreature
